response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the experience requirement with nearly two decades of software development, including recent full-stack work in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB, plus hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling experience that directly matches a rare requirement. Cloud (AWS CDK), Docker/Kubernetes, and a strong testing/TDD background round out the profile. The main gaps are no stated Nest.js, Kotlin, or Vitest experience, though adjacent skills suggest a fast ramp-up.
strengths: Deep full-stack experience with the core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS)
Direct AI-agent development experience, including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, testing tools authorship, and teaching/workshop track record
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience, the primary backend framework
Kotlin and Python are not listed among languages (Java is present but dated)
Significant portion of past work in niche technologies (DLang, Ember.js) rather than the current mainstream stack
